title: calycobolus mortehanii
intro: Calycobolus mortehanii, also known as the 'Mortehani's calycobolus', is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calycobobulus mortehanii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a laxative and to treat respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, herbal preparations of Calycobolus mortehanii are often made from its leaves and roots, which are typically dried and then used in infusions or decoctions.
